item.title: The boy has to get older, but doesn’t have to grow up!
item.description: Yes that’s me on the box. This grizzled old dude was a child model in the 80’s. I am going to do a better job recreating the photo, but thought it would be fun to share.

item.title: Fuck bullies!! What a confident boost this would have been! Sharing because it's something I never saw before and thought it was worth sharing!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: My "Mom" is gone.
item.description: Earlier today, after returning from a trip to my Dr, I laid down to take a nap. A few minutes later, I was gdtting dozens of texts and attempted phone calls from a former foster sibling. She found her mother, my foster mother, dead in her apartment. I hadn't noticed all of the texts or other call attempts.. but for some reason, when I saw the caller ID for the time I did andwer, I was immediately filled with dread. I was supposed to go visit this part of my family for xmas, but I skipped the trip because I was feeling too lazy to travel while dealing with a foot injury. I probably could have traveled... but I didn't. I hadn't seen her in person for about two years now. And now I never will because I was too lazy to get on a plane with crutches. I don't know why i posted this. I will probably delete it. Guess I needed to vent
item.dc:creator: DrYuaTakeda

Get that summer bod goin

item.title: No bro , don’t do it. Not this time.
item.dc:creator: ExistenceIsPainWasTaken

item.title: Meme Dump 26 out of 200
item.description:
Heeey imgur ~ thanks for joining me again with another 11k meme folder dumparoo
Last time i rambled about being cold
Just to fill the void
It meant nothing
But some people took it a bit too seriously Q_Q
I promise im fine lol
Was just cold and feeling too lazy to do anything about it
Okay that's all ! Gonna get the meme train just flow and ride
Best sleeping position ^
Every time lol
It really does though lmao
Thanks for joining me for some memesssss Happy Friday and March 1st ♡ okay byyyyeee #memes #funny #memedump #mentalhealth #gaming
item.dc:creator: Orangefish

item.dc:creator: blondiebrowniesarethebestbrownies

item.title: One day or day one? 360 Pounds gone!
item.description: I've lost 360 pounds since 2021 as of this week. March 1st is off to a great start. Want to hold myself accountable and create a timeline to keep myself on track. Thank you all who have been on this journey with me. I've gotten a ton of rewards and even got Imgur Emerald as a gift. Pretty awesome. Started off at 700 lbs (317.5 kg) and after finding a great endocrinologist I've lost 360 lbs (163 kg). I feel great. Can move and do things that were limited. I was not always 700 but even in my youth I had a weight issue. Undiagnosed vitamin deficiency that caused most food to never be used as energy. Now my body and metabolism are working better than ever. Here's to a new life. Have a great month. Καλό Μήνα! If you want to see more pics of my weight loss journey had to IG @AKosmidisJoint https://www.instagram.com/akosmidisjoint
item.dc:creator: AKosmidisJoint

item.title: They are all Gothic
item.description: Can we please stop gate-keeping? All styles should have the opportunity to develop and prosper and change somewhat over time. We all dress different on different days and occasions. Not all days are a full on make up/outfit day. Here's a few of my outfits from the previous months: https://imgur.com/a/EeVoP5h
item.dc:creator: Miiaka

item.title: I can't even.
item.description: After the death of a non binary student we get this, if anyone in the Tulsa Metro wants something to do next Wednesday counter protesting wouldn't be a bad way to spend a few hours. Wow first fp ever, be good to each other and stand up for those who can't.
item.dc:creator: PopeBruce

item.title: Don't drink and drive, kids
item.description: I used to think he was just really uncoordinated, but it turns out it was all the booze... All joking aside, I'm so incredibly proud of him! If you or someone you know is struggling with addiction, don't be afraid to seek help https://www.aa.org/
